Precedent document generator

Cover Letter Generator

Fill in the details below and generate the client cover letter for a discretionary trust change — entirely in your browser. Nothing here is uploaded anywhere. Pairs with the separate deed/resolution generator, which uses the same trust details.

Checking template source…

1 Trust details

General details of the discretionary trust. Used across every document generated below.

2 Current trustee(s)

Complete details of each current trustee of the trust.

3 Current controller(s)

Complete details of each current controller (appointor/principal) of the trust.

4 Cover letter details

Used to fill in the letter's addressee block and salutation.

5 Which letter do you need?

Choose the type of change — this determines which fields appear below and which letter is generated.

6 Deed of Variation — general

Bamford update, vesting date, succession planning, or other general amendments to the trust deed.

6 Deed of Variation — excluding foreign persons

6 Change of Trustee

Statutory declaration signor

New trustee(s)

6 Change of Beneficiary

Beneficiary changes

6 Change of Controller / Appointor

New controller(s)

6 Appointment of Successor Controller / Appointor

Successor controller(s)

6 Appointment of Successor Trustee

Successor trustee(s)

6 Winding Up & Vesting

The generated deed should still be reviewed and manually amended as necessary.
